title: Section 10
content: The 1 [Principal Commissioner of Customs or Commissioner of Customs] may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint, in or near any customs port, a boarding station for the purpose of boarding of, or disembarkation from, vessels by officers of customs.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 25 of 2014, s. 78, for "Commissioner of Customs (w.e.f. 6-8-2014).
